prompt: Generate 8 different flat icons that are medical-relevant, with text description in the icon bottom. Make sure the icon theme is aligned with the referenced icon provided.
prompt_refined: Generate 8 distinct medical-themed flat icons. Each icon should strictly follow the visual style of image 1, featuring a clean, flat design with dark outlines and a primary color palette of blue, orange, and white, similar to the syringe, medicine bottle, and pills shown in image 1. For each icon, include a brief, relevant text description positioned centrally at its bottom. Arrange these 8 icons in a clear, organized grid or row layout, ensuring sufficient spacing for individual readability.
objects: Brief text description for each icon
